systems.system_notes: Linked semi-constrained total elbow arthroplasty platform with humeral and ulnar stem options.

trays.tray_notes: Official Zimmer Biomet materials describe dedicated instrumentation supporting preparation and assembly of the linked elbow construct.

components.component_notes: Official materials describe humeral stem and spool options within the linked elbow system.
Official materials describe the ulnar component and stem options used with the linked construct.
Official materials describe the linked articulation assembly using dedicated hinge hardware.

unresolved_items.raw_text: The public product page and brochure identify implant families and instrumentation context but do not expose a complete coded product table in this pass.
unresolved_items.reason: A deeper brochure, IFU, or ordering guide pass is required for product-code detail.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction remains at tray and implant-family level.
